subject: Removed the Create Policy Type

Signed-off-by: Lathish <lathishbabu.ganesan@est.tech>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

Hi Latish -Let us defer this to the next release...The current A1 mediator deployed in a VM support policy type creation, and we are testing against the A1 mediator.

No need to merge at this time.

Thanks!

Patch Set 2:

Hi @sandeep 
I understand the CreatePolicyType operation is definitely being removed for the "Bronze" release of the OSC A1 mediator. (ref @TommyC in AT&T)
Since the releases cadences are out of step I suggest marking the CreatePolicyType operation as deprecated, and removing the DG

Patch Set 2:

There is an A1 simulator in OSC NONRTRIC project (Amber Release) that exposes the same A1 interface as the full A1 mediator you are using. It should be more lightweight and easier to test against. We would like to help out with this if you wish.

Patch Set 2: -Code-Review

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> Hi @sandeep 
> I understand the CreatePolicyType operation is definitely being removed for the "Bronze" release of the OSC A1 mediator. (ref @TommyC in AT&T)
> Since the releases cadences are out of step I suggest marking the CreatePolicyType operation as deprecated, and removing the DG

There is no reason to remove DG, you just do not use it....and generally, if there are any future changes to DG to support any YANG model or any other changes, we can just update the DG  in Master branch...Since, my testing involves at this time, A1 Mediator and I am testing against the same, and we can not change YANG model, I prefer to defer all these changes after Frankfurt, and still be ready for OSC Bronze time-frame. Thanks

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2: -Code-Review
> 
> > Patch Set 2:
> > 
> > Hi @sandeep 
> > I understand the CreatePolicyType operation is definitely being removed for the "Bronze" release of the OSC A1 mediator. (ref @TommyC in AT&T)
> > Since the releases cadences are out of step I suggest marking the CreatePolicyType operation as deprecated, and removing the DG
> 
> There is no reason to remove DG, you just do not use it....and generally, if there are any future changes to DG to support any YANG model or any other changes, we can just update the DG  in Master branch...Since, my testing involves at this time, A1 Mediator and I am testing against the same, and we can not change YANG model, I prefer to defer all these changes after Frankfurt, and still be ready for OSC Bronze time-frame. Thanks

Hi again @Sandeep 
Thanks for the response.
We still have a whole month of dev sprints in Frankfurt, and we are more than willing to help with developing the changes and with the testing etc, including CSIT tests.
Also, since OSC can only use 'released' components/dependencies from external projects we would need this functionality added to Frankfurt if it was to be used in/with OSC Bronze functions. 
Also, it is allowed to change interfaces (e.g. Yang file) after M3 if the change is considered a bug fix. I would consider some of the changes suggested address bugs in the current Yang. 
Thanks.
Change has been successfully merged by Dan Timoney

Hi Dan - I would appreciate if you please reverse this merge, and we will come back after joint consultation...Thanks!
